title: Fix Anthropic adapter tool-result sync bug (Haiku Telegram issue)
summary: The buildMessages() function in anthropic-adapter.ts has a race condition where tool_call_ids get orphaned when messages arrive out-of-order (common in Telegram). This causes "tool_use without tool_result" errors. The fix adds strict validation and fallback for missing tool IDs instead of silently dropping them.

affectedFiles.description: Fix tool-result sync in buildMessages() function

estimatedImpact: Unblocks Telegram + Claude Haiku integration; fixes recurring API 400 errors in tool orchestration
executorPrompt: Apply the exact code changes from the proposal to src/providers/anthropic-adapter.ts. Replace lines 117-155 with the corrected version. Test that the file parses correctly (no syntax errors).
